2025-26 UC Irvine Anteaters Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 23-12 (15-5, 1st in Big West MBB)

Coach: Russ Turner

PS/G: 77.3 (140th of 365)

PA/G: 68.6 (49th of 365)

SRS: 3.29 (118th of 365)

SOS: -1.53 (166th of 365)

ORtg: 106.9 (239th of 365)

DRtg: 95.0 (3rd of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +100000

  • Big West Reg Season Champ
